impact_boundary: Зависимости (requirements.txt/requirements-dev.txt), Docker/Container, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Observability (logging/tracing/metrics), Configuration (config.py), Database (alembic/SQLAlchemy), LLM provider integration
risks: OpenAI SDK 1.72.0 -> 2.41.0: MAJOR breaking changes (v2.x полностью переписан API)
google-genai 1.2.0 -> 2.8.0: MAJOR breaking changes (v2.x новый API для Gemini)
aiogram 3.16.0 -> 3.28.2: Minor updates, но 12 версий назад - возможны deprecation warnings
telethon 1.39.0 -> 1.43.2: 4 минорных версии назад - возможны изменения в API
SQLAlchemy 2.0.40 -> 2.0.50: 10 патч-версий назад - багфиксы, возможны изменения в async API
aiosqlite 0.20.0 -> 0.22.1: 2 минорных версии - возможны изменения в connection handling
OpenTelemetry есть но опционально и не интегрирован в healthcheck
Нет dependabot/renovate для автоматического обновления зависимостей
Dockerfile: playwright install в образе увеличивает размер, нет multi-arch поддержки
Requirements.txt: pytest в production deps (строка 28), должен быть в dev

suggested_agents.reason: Миграция OpenAI SDK v1->v2 и google-genai v1->v2 требует значительных изменений в LLM provider коде (src/llm/*), это breaking changes
Обновление aiogram, telethon, SQLAlchemy, aiosqlite - требует тестирования но скорее всего совместимо
Добавить structured logging (structlog), Prometheus metrics, полноценную OpenTelemetry интеграцию
Настроить dependabot/renovate, добавить Makefile/justfile, вынести pytest в requirements-dev.txt
Оптимизировать Dockerfile: отделить playwright browser install, добавить .dockerignore для тестов, multi-stage оптимизация

requirements_txt.policy: pinned to latest stable minor as of May 2026
issues: pytest>=8.0 в production requirements (строка 28) - должен быть в dev

typing_improvements.pep_695_type_params: Not used - no `type` statements or generic classes with `type` syntax
typing_improvements.modern_typing: Uses standard `typing` imports, `|` union syntax partially

python_313_compatibility.deprecated_apis: None detected in config, but OpenAI v1.x and google-genai v1.x may use deprecated patterns
python_313_compatibility.status: Python 3.13 compatible but not leveraging new typing features

openai.models_in_config: gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo via config overrides
openai.gpt5_support: Not in config - OpenAI v2.x required for new models

google_genai.gemini2_support: Not in config - google-genai v2.x required for gemini-2.0

anthropic.models_in_config: claude-3-5-sonnet, claude-3-5-haiku, claude-3-opus via config overrides

ai_ml_stack.migration_complexity: HIGH - OpenAI v1->v2 and google-genai v1->v2 are complete API rewrites requiring code changes in src/llm/*

sqlalchemy.status: 10 patch versions behind, async API stable

aiosqlite.status: 2 minor versions behind, check connection handling changes

aiogram.breaking_changes: 3.17+ dropped Python 3.8, 3.20+ new middleware API, 3.22+ FSM changes - review changelog

telethon.breaking_changes: 1.40+ new entity handling, 1.42+ flood wait changes - review changelog

observability.structured_logging: MISSING - only stdlib logging.basicConfig in main.py, 337+ logger.getLogger() calls but no JSON formatting
observability.metrics_prometheus: MISSING - custom in-memory metrics in memory_metrics.py and cache_manager.py, no Prometheus exposition
observability.tracing_opentelemetry: PARTIAL - src/core/infra/telemetry.py exists but optional (OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT), not integrated in healthcheck, no auto-instrumentation
observability.healthchecks: EXISTS - healthcheck.py checks DB + imports, used in Docker HEALTHCHECK and docker-compose
recommendations: Enable OpenTelemetry by default with OTLP exporter
Integrate tracing into healthcheck and request pipeline

container_docker.dockerfile: Multi-stage (builder/runner), python:3.13-slim, venv copy, playwright install in runner
container_docker.dockerignore: Comprehensive (42 lines), excludes .git, venv, data, logs, caches, IDE, docs
container_docker.docker_compose: Basic - service, healthcheck, volumes, logging rotation
best_practices_issues: Playwright chromium install in runner stage increases image size significantly (~200MB+)
No non-root user in builder stage
Playwright browsers path in /app/data (volume) - good for persistence but unusual
recommendations: Move playwright install to builder or separate stage
Consider distroless or gcr.io/distroless/python3-debian12 for runner

ci_cd.github_actions: EXISTS - .github/workflows/test.yml with lint (ruff), typecheck (pyright), alembic checks, pytest
ci_cd.pre_commit: MISSING - ruff/pyright run in CI but not as pre-commit hooks
recommendations: Add dependabot.yml for weekly dependency updates
Add renovate.json for more granular control
Add Makefile or justfile with: dev, test, lint, typecheck, migrate, build, clean
Add scripts for common operations (db reset, seed, logs)

breaking_changes: Responses API: new responses.create() for reasoning models
Beta APIs: beta.chat.completions.parse() for structured output

google_genai_v1_to_v2.files_affected: Same as OpenAI - provider manager and router

strategy: 1. Create feature branch for LLM provider upgrades
2. Update provider_manager.py abstraction to support both v1/v2 during transition
3. Migrate OpenAI first (most used), test thoroughly
5. Update config.py model defaults for new models
6. Add integration tests for each provider

config_llm_defaults.model_overrides: maestro_model, draft_model, memory_model, search_model, humanize_model, classify_model, summarize_model, skills_model, background_model, vision_model, stt_model - all empty by default
config_llm_defaults.missing: No explicit model version pinning for new models (gpt-5, gemini-2)
